name: Slightly Italian Chicken
recipeIngredient: 4 large boneless chicken breasts (remove all skin)
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray crockpot inside with vegetable cooking spray.
2. Place drained mushrooms, artichoke hearts, and chopped green onions at the bottom of the crockpot.
3. Sprinkle vegetables with a heaping 2 tablespoons of quick-cooking tapioca and 1 envelope of low-sodium chicken bouillon (about 1 teaspoon if using granulated bouillon).
4. Place well-washed, dried boneless chicken breasts in the pot (remove all skin and fat).
5. Combine remaining sauce ingredients (fresh lemon juice, oregano, garlic powder, Italian salad dressing, white wine, Worcestershire sauce) and pour over the chicken and vegetables.
6. Cover and cook on high for 5-6 hours or until tender. The tapioca will thicken the sauce while cooking.
